title: chrysanthemum longibracteatum
intro: Chrysanthemum longibracteatum, also known as the Long-bracted chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in East Asian cultures, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum longibracteatum include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and improving respiratory health, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
